input.description: List files in sms and calendar directories using dir command

content.text:
All three files have been created successfully. Here's a summary:

**Created files:**

1. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\sms\SmsReader.kt`
   - `RawSms` data class (sender, body, date)
   - `SmsReader` class that queries the SMS content provider, filtering messages containing court-related keywords (法院, 开庭, 传票, 案件, 送达, court.gov.cn, 案号)

2. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\sms\SmsParser.kt`
   - `ParsedSms` data class (caseNumber, courtName, hearingTime, partyNames, webUrl)
   - `SmsParser` class with regex patterns to extract case numbers, court names, party names, URLs, and hearing dates from SMS text
   - Supports multiple date formats (年月日, yyyy-MM-dd, yyyy/MM/dd)
   - Simplifies court names (e.g., "临沂市河东区人民法院" -> "河东区法院")

3. `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\CourtAssistant\app\src\main\java\com\court\assistant\calendar\CalendarSync.kt`
   - `CalendarSync` class that creates calendar events for court hearings
   - Deduplication via `eventExists()` check before inserting
   - Sets 2-hour event duration with two reminders (1 day and 1 hour before)
   - Builds descriptive titles and descriptions from case data
